title: Fermented British Grain Pasta
description: A rich and comforting dish made with fermented British grains, mixed with a creamy pasta water emulsion, featuring anti-inflammatory properties.
instructions: Combine the Kamut wheat berries, bulgur, spelt, and Red Fife wheat berries in a large bowl, rinsed and drained.
In a medium saucepan, combine the water and butter. Bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the flour and whisk until smooth. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in the miso paste and nutritional yeast.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the pasta and toss to coat, then add the grain mixture and toss to combine.
Add the sauce and toss to coat the pasta and grains.
Cook over low heat for 5-7 minutes, stirring constantly, until the sauce has thickened and the grains are coated.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
